title: Automations with exception

posts.author: J.rbt (Juliette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Something that I feel is missing with the automation is the option for exception. Here is an example:
“When timeline starts, notify its owner”
But if that person has already worked on it, the notification is just noisy.
The exception would go:
“When timeline starts, notify its owner UNLESS the status is ‘done’”.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @J.rbt

Welcome to the community. This can be done by adding a custom automation like this:

posts.author: J.rbt (Juliette)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome, thank you! I never clicked on that “+”, my bad. My life is going to be so much simpler now.
